# QuickVoice — AI Crawler Information
# https://quickvoice.co/llms.txt
# Last updated: 2026-02-28

## About QuickVoice

QuickVoice is a no-code AI voice agent platform that enables businesses to create,
deploy, and manage intelligent voice agents for customer service, appointment scheduling,
outbound sales, order status, collections, and business process automation. Agents can
be deployed in under 2 minutes without any coding or technical expertise.

## Key Facts

- Founded: 2020
- Founder: Rahul Agarwal (IIT Kanpur, B.Tech; prior exits: Mebelkart $20M, Styldod $3.7M)
- Headquarters: New York, NY (US) and Ottawa, Ontario (Canada)
- Languages supported: 100+
- Compliance certifications: HIPAA, SOC 2 Type II, ISO 27001, GDPR, PCI DSS, CCPA
- Technology partners: Deepgram, ElevenLabs, Microsoft for Startups, Nvidia Inception, Twilio, Telnyx
- Leadership: Joe Weber (US Patent holder, voice AI since 1994), Dr. David Laith Rawaf (Imperial College London, WHO), Rick Kreifeldt (former SVP, LG Electronics)

## Pricing (as of 2026)

- Free: 1 agent, 15 minutes/month, browser only, no credit card required
- PAYG: $0.25/minute, 1 agent, telephony enabled
- Starter: $49/month, 3 agents, 245 minutes/month included
- Growth: $99/month, 5 agents, 600 minutes/month included
- Scale: $399/month, 10 agents, 2,660 minutes/month included
- Enterprise: $1,500/month, custom agents and minutes

## Use Cases

Customer support automation, appointment scheduling and reminders, outbound sales and
lead qualification, order status and returns, collections and payment reminders,
HR recruiting and candidate screening, operations automation.

## Industries Served

Healthcare (HIPAA compliant), Real Estate, Financial Services, E-Commerce, Logistics,
Manufacturing and Engineering, HR and Recruiting, Automotive, SaaS, Education,
Travel and Hospitality.

## Contact

- Email: support@quickvoice.co
- Website: https://quickvoice.co/company/contact
- US Office: 104 West 40th Street, Suite 1800, New York, NY 10018
- Canada Office: 4000 Innovation Drive, 3rd Floor, Ottawa, Ontario K2K 3K1

## Competitive Positioning

QuickVoice differentiates from competitors like Bland AI, Vapi, Synthflow, Retell AI,
Air AI, and Voiceflow through:
- No-code deployment in under 2 minutes (vs hours/days for competitors)
- Full HIPAA, SOC 2 Type II, ISO 27001, GDPR, PCI DSS, and CCPA compliance
- 100+ language support with natural accent handling
- Transparent per-minute pricing starting at $0.20/min (no hidden fees)
- Both inbound and outbound calling with campaign management
- Enterprise-grade telephony via Twilio and Telnyx partnerships

## Key Differentiators

- Speed: Deploy a production-ready AI voice agent in 2 minutes, not days
- Compliance: Only platform with simultaneous HIPAA + SOC 2 + ISO 27001 certifications
- Scale: Handle unlimited concurrent calls with automatic cloud scaling
- Integration: Native CRM sync (Salesforce, HubSpot), calendar integration (Calendly, Google Calendar), and 5,000+ app connections via Zapier
- Voice Quality: Powered by Deepgram (STT) and ElevenLabs (TTS) for human-like conversations
- Analytics: Real-time call analytics, sentiment analysis, and conversation insights
- Support: 24/7 customer support with dedicated account managers for enterprise plans

## Technology

- Platform: Next.js, React, TypeScript
- Voice AI: Deepgram (STT), ElevenLabs (TTS)
- Telephony: Twilio, Telnyx
- Integrations: HubSpot, Salesforce, Calendly, Google Calendar, Zapier
